mapper.select: SELECT A.CPRT_CARD_GDNC_SEQ ,A.CPRT_CARD_GDNC_NM ,A.CPRT_CARD_CD , (SELECT A.DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL A WHERE A.CD_GROUP_ID='CO0008' AND A.DTL_CD=CPRT_CARD_CD) AS CPRT_CARD_NM ,A.CPRT_CARD_BAS_DESC ,A.CPRT_CARD_THUMB_IMG_NM ,A.CPRT_CARD_LARGE_IMG_NM ,A.GDNC_FILE_NM ,A.USE_YN ,A.PSTNG_START_DATE ,A.PSTNG_END_DATE ,A.CRET_IP ,A.CRET_DT ,A.CRET_ID ,A.AMD_IP ,A.AMD_DT ,A.AMD_ID , IS_PLAN_BANNER_ENABLED , PLAN_BANNER_TITLE , PLAN_BANNER_TEXT FROM NMCP_CPRT_CARD_GDNC_BAS A WHERE 1=1 AND IS_PLAN_BANNER_ENABLED = 'Y' AND USE_YN ='Y' AND ROWNUM = 1
